underlying_goal: Refactor data parsing code to be more readable with separated helper functions, clean integration points, and proper code organization
friction_detail: Claude set deprecated 'model' parameter in GitHub Actions workflow requiring a second fix, and initial refactor broke tests by surfacing data parse errors that should have been non-fatal.
brief_summary: User refactored Go data parsing code into clean helper functions through extensive discussion with Claude about Go idioms and design decisions, successfully merging the PR and updating CI config.
